problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light may resolve How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
